content:
Item 9B. Other Information
Disclosure Pursuant to Section 13(r) of the Exchange Act
As previously disclosed, we determined that, [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME], we processed and delivered orders of consumer products for certain individuals and entities located outside [LOCATION] covered by the Iran Threat Reduction and Syria Human Rights Act. The information provided pursuant to Section 13(r) of the Exchange Act in [DATE_TIME] of Part II of the Company’s Quarterly Reports on 10-Q for [DATE_TIME], [DATE_TIME] and [DATE_TIME] is hereby incorporated by reference to such reports.
PART III
Item 10.
